# transport-bar

## Plugin reference

- Description: Sonata toolbar transport: play/pause button and a Synthesia-style speed stepper ([‚àí xx% +]) with live BPM. Contributes to the Sonata toolbar's End zone.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `SonataToolbar.End` "playback" ‚Üí `PlaybackControls`
  - Uses: `apps/sonata/shell.SonataToolbar`, `apps/sonata/shell.useCursorSelector`, `apps/sonata/shell.useSonata`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/icon-button.IconButton`, `primitives/ui-kit.cn`
